overview: AquaTrack is a real-time water tank monitoring dashboard that visualizes water levels, triggers status alerts, and connects to an ESP32 sensor over your local network. Features a dark theme with red accents, simulation mode for testing, and a fully configurable alert system.
features: Live water tank visualization with animated fill (0–100%)
Status alerts: Safe, Warning, and Danger with configurable thresholds
Simulation slider to test levels and alerts without live data
Configurable ESP32 API endpoint, device name, location, and threshold
Auto-refresh every 2 seconds from live sensor data
Reading history with area chart and last 24 entries
Dark black theme with bright red accents
Responsive layout with sidebar, main tank view, and metrics panel
